case_title: WILLIAM D. BAKER VS. DAVID L. DIPUMA

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL HEARING SET FOR DEC-21-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR, DUPLICATE ENTRY.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L. HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED - WITH ATTACHED P.O.S. FROM SHERIFF -
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED ON JULY 10, 2014 BY CREDITOR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DAVID L. DIPUMA; 580 GEARY BLVD., SF CA 94102
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $210.50 ACCRUED INTEREST, $125.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-12-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE FOR SIX MONTHS. BALANCE OF JUDGMENT IS $1,265.50. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $100 BEGINNING ON JULY 20, 2013 AND CONTINUING ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULL PAYMENT IS MADE. IF ANY, PAYMENTS IS MORE THAN 5 DAYS LATE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY TERMINATE THE INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS AND SEEK ENFORCEMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. NO INTEREST SHALL ACCRUE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SIX-MONTH INVESTIGATION REPORT (CONFIDENTIAL)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $8.25 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM RECEIVED AND FILED. (SERVICE FEE $35.00)
RETURN MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER SENT TO DEFENDENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-10-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY BAKER, WILLIAM D. AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L. HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DAVID L. DIPUMA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-16-2013 (SERVICE FEE $35.00) AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAKER, WILLIAM D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L. $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, WILLIAM D. AS TO DEFENDANT DIPUMA, DAVID L.
